      Our Story

      More Than
      A Haircut

      At Smooth Cutz, we believe grooming is self-care. Whether you're rocking locs, braids, a fresh cut, or a quick weave — we treat every style with the precision it deserves.

      Located in the heart of Florissant, MO, our shop is a space where everyone belongs. We specialize in natural hair, locs, and precision cuts — all with a warm, welcoming vibe.
